vscode-dashboard.description: Engineering observability dashboard for GitHub repositories
dashboard.open.title: Open Dashboard
dashboard.configuration.title: Engineering Dashboard
dashboard.owner.description: GitHub owner or organization used by the dashboard.
dashboard.repo.description: GitHub repository name used by the dashboard.
dashboard.githubToken.description: Optional GitHub token for private repositories or higher API limits.
dashboard.releaseSource.description: Release source used for release and DORA-inspired metrics.
dashboard.releaseSource.tags.description: Use GitHub Releases or versioned tags as the production release proxy.
dashboard.releaseSource.main.description: Use main branch commit pipelines as the release proxy.
